I appreciate a lot your content. The snippet that evaluate uptrend or downtrend is very slow, I've refactorized it removing loops and now is very fast. I share my update. Thanks for your effort and strategies. Alex.
df['Max_Open_Close'] = np.maximum(df['Open'], df['Close'])
df['Min_Open_Close'] = np.minimum(df['Open'], df['Close'])
df['upt'] = 1
df['dnt'] = 1
df.loc[(df['Max_Open_Close'] >= df['VWAP']), 'dnt'] = 0
df.loc[(df['Min_Open_Close'] <= df['VWAP']), 'upt'] = 0
df['sig_dnt'] = df['dnt'].rolling(backcandles + 1, min_periods=1).min()
df['sig_upt'] = df['upt'].rolling(backcandles + 1, min_periods=1).min()
df['VWAPSignal2'] = 0
df.loc[(df['sig_upt'] == 1) & (df['sig_dnt'] == 1), 'VWAPSignal2'] = 3
df.loc[(df['sig_upt'] == 1) & (df['sig_dnt'] == 0), 'VWAPSignal2'] = 2
df.loc[(df['sig_upt'] == 0) & (df['sig_dnt'] == 1), 'VWAPSignal2'] = 1

For anyone wondering whether this strategy works in real trading, I tested it over three months using a demo account with order execution via Python and MT5 (EURUSD CFD). The result showed that it's ultimately unprofitable due to commission fees, which consistently led to losses. However, I am currently experimenting with a martingale strategy to offset these losses, as the probability of encountering five to six consecutive losses appears to be relatively low. So far, the results seem more promising.

The issue with the volume data is that it is not reliable on most assets, only on stocks, futures and indexes, on forex the volume is the volume that each broker gives you and not the real volume. Therefore, I think that in forex (and specially a CFD broker like Dukascopy, on which the volume is completely unreliable), therefore, I think all strategies that involves and indicator with Volume should not be considered.

I built a pinescript version for back testing purpose's. I see its performance isnt good, can you perhaps tell me why? 

//@version=5
strategy("VWAP, RSI, and Bollinger Bands Strategy with ATR SL/TP", overlay=true)

// Parameters
lengthRSI = 16
lengthBB = 20 // Adjusted to match your custom BB script
maType = "SMA" // MA Type for Bollinger Bands
stdDevBB = 2.0
src = close // Source for Bollinger Bands
atrLength = 7 // ATR length
TPSLRatio = 1.5
slMultiplier = 1.2
initsize = 0.99 // 99% of equity
backCandles = 20 // Number of candles to check

// Bollinger Bands Calculation
ma(source, length, _type) =>
    switch _type
        "SMA" => ta.sma(source, length)
        "EMA" => ta.ema(source, length)
        "SMMA (RMA)" => ta.rma(source, length)
        "WMA" => ta.wma(source, length)
        "VWMA" => ta.vwma(source, length)

basis = ma(src, lengthBB, maType)
dev = stdDevBB * ta.stdev(src, lengthBB)
upperBB = basis + dev
lowerBB = basis - dev

// Other Indicators
vwapValue = ta.vwap(close)
rsiValue = ta.rsi(close, lengthRSI)
atrValue = ta.atr(atrLength)

// Function to check if the last N candles are above/below the VWAP
areCandlesConsistentlyAboveVWAP() =>
    sum = 0
    for i = 0 to backCandles - 1
        if close[i] > vwapValue[i]
            sum := sum + 1
    sum == backCandles

areCandlesConsistentlyBelowVWAP() =>
    sum = 0
    for i = 0 to backCandles - 1
        if close[i] < vwapValue[i]
            sum := sum + 1
    sum == backCandles

// Entry Conditions
longCondition = areCandlesConsistentlyAboveVWAP() and rsiValue < 45 and open < lowerBB
shortCondition = areCandlesConsistentlyBelowVWAP() and rsiValue > 55 and open > upperBB
// Check for exit conditions and close the trade if necessary
if strategy.position_size > 0 and rsiValue >= 90
    strategy.close("Long")
if strategy.position_size < 0 and rsiValue <= 10
    strategy.close("Short")

// Calculate SL and TP levels
long_sl = close - atrValue * slMultiplier
long_tp = close + atrValue * slMultiplier * TPSLRatio
short_sl = close + atrValue * slMultiplier
short_tp = close - atrValue * slMultiplier * TPSLRatio

// Open new trades or set SL/TP for existing trades
if longCondition and strategy.position_size <= 0
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long, qty=strategy.equity * initsize / close, comment="Enter Long")
    strategy.exit("Long SL/TP", "Long", stop=long_sl, limit=long_tp)

if shortCondition and strategy.position_size >= 0
    strategy.entry("Short", strategy.short, qty=strategy.equity * initsize / close, comment="Enter Short")
    strategy.exit("Short SL/TP", "Short", stop=short_sl, limit=short_tp)

// Plotting
plot(vwapValue, color=color.blue, title="VWAP")
plot(upperBB, color=color.green, title="Upper BB")
plot(lowerBB, color=color.green, title="Lower BB")
